Privacy.title: Privacy & Analytics
Privacy.description: Manage how your usage data is collected
Privacy.optOutDescription: Stop all usage tracking. Your existing data is retained.
Privacy.whatWeTrack: We track: page views, feature usage (lessons viewed, quizzes taken, flashcards reviewed, tutor messages). All data is pseudonymized with no personal identifiers.
Privacy.whatWeDoNotTrack: We do NOT track: message content, quiz answers, personal data (name, email), session recordings, or cookies.
Privacy.howStored: Data is stored on EU servers (PostHog EU) using localStorage only. No cookies are used. Your IP address is not captured. DNT headers are respected.
Privacy.yourRights: You can opt out at any time using the toggle above. On account deletion, all analytics data linked to your pseudonymized ID is removed.

About.title: About Sira
About.heroOrigin: From Bambara Donniya Sira — "the path to knowledge"
About.heroDescription: Sira turns your documents into complete, personalized courses — with lessons, quizzes, flashcards, and a virtual tutor. In French and English, even offline.
About.problem1: Quality training materials are scarce in many African professional fields.
About.problem2: Existing platforms assume stable broadband, modern devices, and English fluency.
About.problem3: Experts have knowledge but no affordable way to package and monetize it as courses.
About.problem4: Learners on limited networks with basic phones are excluded from online learning.
About.howStep1Desc: Experts or admins upload documents in any domain. Sira extracts, structures, and organizes the content into a full course — automatically.
About.howStep2Desc: Personalized lessons, quizzes, flashcards, and case studies — calibrated to each learner's level, language, and country. A virtual tutor answers questions with source citations.
About.howStep3Desc: Download courses for offline use. Works on slow networks. Progress syncs when you reconnect. Designed for any screen size.
About.featureSmartCourseDesc: Upload your documents, get a complete course with lessons, quizzes, and flashcards — automatically.
About.featureTutorDesc: Ask questions in French or English, get answers drawn directly from your course materials.
About.featureAdaptiveDesc: The platform adjusts to your level — questions get harder or easier based on your performance.
About.featureRevisionDesc: Flashcards in both languages, scheduled so you review at the right time for long-term retention.
About.featureOfflineDesc: Download your courses, study without internet, everything syncs when you reconnect.
About.featureMarketplaceDesc: Package your expertise into courses, set your price, earn revenue from every enrollment.
About.featureLearningPathsDesc: Organized curricula that guide learners through courses in the right order.
About.featureBilingualDesc: French and English — interface and content — switchable instantly.
About.featurePaymentsDesc: Pay with mobile money (Orange Money, Wave) or card. Credit-based, pay only for what you use.
About.featureMultiDomainDesc: Health, agriculture, STEM, law, business, education — create courses in any domain.
About.builtForLearnersDesc: Students, professionals, anyone seeking structured, quality training in their field.
About.builtForExpertsDesc: Teachers, professors, consultants who want to turn their knowledge into revenue-generating courses.
About.builtForOrgsDesc: Companies and NGOs who need to train teams with custom learning paths and progress tracking.
About.trustEncryption: Your data is encrypted and stored securely.
About.trustCompliance: Compliant with GDPR and data protection laws of Senegal, Ghana, Nigeria, and Côte d'Ivoire.
About.contactCta: Questions, partnerships, or feedback — we'd love to hear from you.
